title: Pan-Seared Skirt Steak with Savory Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the tender skirt steak with a savory stir fry, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: skirt steak
ingredients.notes: preferably at room temperature before cooking

instructions: Season the skirt steak with cumin, coriander, and salt. Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the skirt steak for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 8-10 minutes for medium-rare.
While the steak is cooking, heat a separate skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, until they start to soften.
Stir in soy sauce, honey, and a pinch of salt. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce thickens.
Remove the skirt steak from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve with the savory stir fry, garnished with parsley.
